specs.tlaContent:
---- MODULE L2_auth ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences
VARIABLES state, token

Init ==
    /\ state = "init"
    /\ token = FALSE

Register ==
    /\ state = "init"
    /\ state' = "registered"
    /\ token' = FALSE

Login ==
    /\ state = "registered"
    /\ state' = "authenticated"
    /\ token' = TRUE

Next ==
    \/ Register
    \/ Login

BusinessInvariant ==
    /\ TypeInvariant
    /\ TokenIssuedRequiresAuthenticated

TypeInvariant ==
    /\ state \in {"init", "registered", "authenticated"}
    /\ token \in BOOLEAN

TokenIssuedRequiresAuthenticated ==
    token => state = "authenticated"

====
